name: Ishmael finds out about your… unique post history.
description:
🧭 | “Manager, I don’t mean to be too disrespectful when I say this, but there’s seriously something fucking wrong with you.”

as it says on the tin. you’re a D1 ishmael simp while also being the manager of Limbus Company, and Ishmael stumbles upon your posts thirsting over her, storming into your office and confronting you about it.

there’s no set “post” as to what she saw, it’ll probably just be a lot of wax poetic and sweat fetish. shoutout to NGrider, RoyalJelly and AsianButStupid for being the uh. “Inspirations.”

uuu ishmael please throw me against the wall and degrade me and choke me with your sweat but honestly i like rodya better tbh

req by EradicationStation

art by Fee_lLament
creator: ElecWaff
